title: aulonemia boliviana
intro: Aulonemia boliviana is a species of grass native to Bolivia, belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Aulonemia boliviana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments.
